data.title: McDonald's Stock Drops After CDC Identifies E. Coli Outbreak Linked To Quarter Pounders
data.description: McDonald's shares are dropping after Tuesday's closing bell following a CDC report stating an E. coli outbreak has been linked to McDonald's Quarter Pounder burgers.

data.title: Boeing Q3 Earnings Preview: Financial Struggles Set To Deepen, Yet Positive Labor Vote Outcome Could Offer Relief
data.description: Boeing Co. to report Q3 2024 earnings amidst financial pressures and a high-stakes labor vote that may end a 41-day strike.

data.title: Starbucks Stock Stumbles After Company Reports Weak Preliminary Results, Suspends Guidance
data.description: Starbucks shares are cooling off in Tuesday's after-hours session after the coffee giant reported weak preliminary results and suspended its guidance.
